  • Classes in com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.model used by com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.model
    Class
    Description
    Home
    Represents a home in the Tibber API.
    Home.Address
    Represents an address in the Tibber API.
    Home.Features
    Represents features available for a home in the Tibber API.
    Home.MeteringPointData
    Represents metering point data in the Tibber API.
    Home.PriceInfo
    Represents price information in the Tibber API.
    Home.Subscription
    Represents a subscription in the Tibber API.
    Price
    Represents electricity price information in the Tibber API.
  • Classes in com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.model used by com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.query
    Class
    Description
    Consumption
    Represents consumption data in the Tibber API.
    Price
    Represents electricity price information in the Tibber API.
    Production
    Represents production data in the Tibber API.
    User
    Represents a Tibber user.
  • Classes in com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.model used by com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.subscription
    Class
    Description
    LiveMeasurement
    Represents real-time measurement data from the Tibber API.
